improvement: Added a fail-closed validator that binds deployment acceptance and evidence-promotion decisions to the exact same deployment-proof bytes and rejects contradictory promotion state.

verification.route: isolated Node.js test execution using byte-identical source before commit
cases: accept coherent accepted promotion for one proof digest
reject promotion bound to another proof digest
reject promotion when deployment acceptance is false
accept coherent rejection without claiming deployment proof

claim_state.observed: The promotion builder existed and was wired before finalization, while the existing cross-artifact consistency validator checked deployment decision and acceptance only.
claim_state.implemented: A separate promotion-consistency validator now checks exact proof digest binding, acceptance/promotion agreement, nested promotion agreement, and fail-closed rejection semantics.
claim_state.unresolved: The validator is committed and tested but is not yet wired into the deployment workflow or final evidence manifest in this slice.
not_claimed: the production surface serves this commit
scientific or medical truth was established

privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, commit identifiers, test outcomes, and bounded infrastructure claims only. No private chat, health data, diagnosis, treatment recommendation, credentials, or identifying personal material.
falsification_route: Run the committed tests; alter proof bytes, acceptance state, top-level promotion digest, or nested promotion digest. Any contradiction must return ok=false.
